message:
feat(vdbe,core): add SIMD-accelerated MakeRecord serialization and refactor prepared DML entry point with migration busy retry

VDBE SIMD MakeRecord fast path:
- Add make_record_simd.rs module with SIMD-accelerated integer record
  serialization: classifies 4-integer blocks using AVX2 when available,
  falls back to scalar for non-AVX2 targets
- Computes header size, varint encoding, and serial types for
  integer-only rows without branching through the generic serializer
- Wire four MakeRecord code paths in engine.rs to try the SIMD/scalar
  integer fast path (try_serialize_integer_record_iter_into) for rows
  with >= 4 columns before falling through to generic serialization
- Update fsqlite-vdbe Cargo.toml: replace workspace lints with
  crate-local lints allowing unsafe_code (needed for SIMD intrinsics)
  while preserving all pedantic/nursery clippy rules
- Register make_record_simd module in lib.rs

Connection prepared DML refactor:
- Extract execute_prepared_dml_entry() to unify autocommit transaction
  management, statement savepoint logic, constraint violation rollback,
  and hot-path profiling across all prepared DML entry points
- Add PreparedDmlAutocommitProfileMode and
  PreparedDmlEntryExecutionOutcome types
- Switch row scratch from MemRowValues to SmallVec<[SqliteValue; 16]>
  for reduced allocation on typical row widths
- Add prebuilt_constant_record field to PreparedDirectSimpleInsert
- Import sqlite_compile_options for PRAGMA compile_options support
- Update documentation for pending memdb direct upsert batching

Migration busy retry:
- Add retry loop in apply_one() for FrankenError::Busy with 2ms
  backoff and 1s timeout, wrapping existing logic in apply_one_once()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
